$schema_note: Podcast Production Engine (Skill 58) PINNED balance endpoints for the daily smoke test (furnace-design Guardrail 1). The runtime NEVER guesses an endpoint: podcast-smoke-test.py reads THIS file. Per-service check order is cheapest-method-first and a model turn is the last resort. The entire daily run must cost at most smoke_budget.max_cost_usd. Method 1 is a free or near-zero balance query; Method 2 is a near-zero fallback (a status-only reachability HEAD, or for Ollama Cloud a single capped turn) used only when no balance endpoint exists. If even Method 2 would exceed the run budget, mark the provider UNKNOWN and skip; do not spend to find out. Every endpoint here is a LIVE-VERIFY item: the canary confirms each path against live provider docs (verified where noted below as of pinned_at). This file names credential ENV LABELS only, never a secret value.

ollama_cloud.verified: 2026-07-06 (no balance endpoint confirmed via open upstream issues ollama/ollama#15132, #15663, #16448)

method_1_balance.reason: Ollama Cloud exposes NO programmatic account usage or credit endpoint as of pinned_at; usage is visible only at ollama.com/settings or via email warnings. Method 2 applies.

ollama_cloud.forbidden: Never use the local signed-in daemon for the smoke test: no ollama run, no 127.0.0.1:11434, no https://ollama.com/api/tags (public, returns 200, proves nothing). A :cloud daemon turn silently bills Ollama Cloud. The capped turn MUST hit the HTTPS cloud endpoint with a hard output cap only.

method_1_balance.note: Returns key limit and usage and costs nothing. No completion call is ever made for the smoke test.

alt_balance.note: Alternate credit-balance endpoint used by the fleet Skill 57 preflight gate; kept as a documented alternate.

kie_ai.verified: 2026-07-06 (in-production fleet path from Skill 57 preflight_gate.py and Skill 07 kie-setup)

method_1_balance.note: Remaining-credit lookup; never runs an image generation task.
Wallet/credit balance; never runs a text-to-speech synthesis. The free tier is never used for anything client-related.

perplexity.verified: 2026-07-06 (optional; only when the client has Perplexity wired)

method_1_reachability.note: If Perplexity is not wired, the provider is skipped entirely (not marked FAIL). Any actual search call is FORBIDDEN in the smoke test.

podcast_engine.unknown_provider_policy: If a provider exposes no balance endpoint and even the near-zero Method 2 would exceed the run budget, mark that provider status UNKNOWN and skip. Do not spend to find out.
